title: Ethiopian Spicy Cheese Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy Ethiopian-inspired wrap filled with melted cheese and fresh ingredients.

ingredients.name: Spicy Cheese Blend
ingredients.notes: A mix of cheddar, mozzarella, and pepper jack cheese

ingredients.name: Flour Tortilla
ingredients.notes: or substitute with Ethiopian injera bread

instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
2. Place the flour tortilla or Ethiopian injera bread in the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until lightly browned and crispy.
3. Sprinkle the spicy cheese blend over half of the tortilla, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
4. Add the sliced cucumber, diced tomato, and thinly sliced red onion on top of the cheese.
5. Sprinkle the Ethiopian spices, chopped cilantro, and a squeeze of lemon juice over the top.
6. Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the cheese is melted and the tortilla is crispy.
7. Remove from heat and let cool for a minute or two before serving.
